input.command:
# Test with proper recipient for EVM destination
curl -s -X POST "https://api.relay.link/quote/v2" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "user": "7EcDhSYGxXyscszYEp35KHN8vvw3svAuLKTzXwCFLtV",
    "originChainId": 792703809,
    "destinationChainId": 8453,
    "originCurrency": "11111111111111111111111111111111",
    "destinationCurrency": "0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000",
    "amount": "100000000",
    "tradeType": "EXACT_INPUT",
    "recipient": "0xd8dA6BF26964aF9D7eEd9e03E53415D37aA96045",
    "useExternalLiquidity": true
  }' 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(json.dumps(d, indent=2)[:600])"
input.description: Test Relay quote from Solana with EVM recipient

metadata.description: Test Relay quote from Solana with EVM recipient
